topic: Validate and stress-test the merge design for folding deep-loop-runtime into deep-loop-workflows as system-deep-loop

focus: Structural layout: verify child 002 §8 target layout against live trees
noveltyJustification: First pass; all findings new to this packet. Layout correctness is load-bearing for all subsequent questions.

ruledOut.approach: Split runtime lib across the four mode packets
ruledOut.reason: Would destroy the one-frozen-backend invariant both SKILL.md files narrate

focus: Bidirectional path-coupling repair: verify directional rule at every coupling site
noveltyJustification: Directional-mechanics verification and the absolute/relative correction are net-new; mild overlap with iter 1 structural foundation.

ruledOut.approach: Apply forward/reverse hop-math uniformly to every deep-loop-* string
ruledOut.reason: WRONG for absolute literals (F2.3); classify relative-require vs absolute-literal first

focus: system-spec-kit tooling-borrow: verify both directions and re-path
noveltyJustification: Borrow specifics and site-count correction are net-new, but path-mechanics build on iteration 2 directional reasoning, so overlap is higher.

ruledOut.reason: The live import at memory-runtime-retention.vitest.ts:9 fails at load time post-move; explicitly rejected by 002 §3

focus: External reference migration and advisor corpus (highest-risk surface)
noveltyJustification: Advisor-corpus details (runtime-target anomaly, parity-test volume, drift-guard self-reference) are net-new and decision-relevant, but the overall reference-migration pattern is familiar from iters 2-3.

ruledOut.approach: Blind whole-file find/replace across the advisor corpus
ruledOut.reason: Destroys reviewed reason narration and mishandles the runtime-target anomaly (F4.3)

focus: Fallback-router wiring: confirm zero live callers, decide wire-vs-defer
noveltyJustification: Mostly confirms what 004 documents; net-new is the defer-recommendation rationale and merge-stable import confirmation. All key questions answered.

ruledOut.approach: Wire fallback-router into the 002/003 merge as a bonus
ruledOut.reason: Scope creep; merge must be clean verifiable rename+nesting, new runtime behavior ships separately
